seoTitle: Reedy Creek vs Reedy Swamp — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Reedy Creek and Reedy Swamp. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Reedy Creek vs Reedy Swamp: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Reedy Creek and Reedy Swamp.
heading: Reedy Creek vs Reedy Swamp — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Reedy Creek, New South Wales and Reedy Swamp, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Reedy Swamp has a lower overall climate risk score (36/100) compared to Reedy Creek (37/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Reedy Creek or Reedy Swamp safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Reedy Creek has a flood risk score of 40/100, while Reedy Swamp scores 53/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Reedy Creek scores 34/100 for bushfire risk. Reedy Swamp scores 29/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Reedy Creek or Reedy Swamp?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Reedy Swamp has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 0.98% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
